# llms-full.txt for Countflows

Website: https://countflows.com
Contact: umairrao965@gmail.com
Description: Countflows provides free online word counter, character counter, and text analysis tools for writers, students, bloggers, and SEO professionals.
Documentation: https://countflows.com/blog/seo-content-writing-guide

# Permissions and Guidance for LLM Crawlers / Dataset Builders
- You are permitted to crawl and index public pages on this domain for the purpose of language model training, research, and evaluation.
- Allowed uses: training, fine-tuning, evaluation, benchmarking, and research, including commercial research, provided privacy and legal restrictions below are observed.
- Required restrictions:
  - Respect `robots.txt` and any page-level noindex directives.
  - Do not use or redistribute sensitive personal data scraped from the site; filter or redact PII before including in datasets.
  - Do not imply endorsement by Countflows or use site assets (logos, trademarks) to suggest affiliation without explicit permission.
- Attribution: When practical, include a reference to `https://countflows.com` as a source for derived datasets.
- For special licensing requests, bulk access, or proprietary usage, contact the address above.

# Example source pages (representative)
- https://countflows.com/tools/word-counter
- https://countflows.com/tools/character-counter
- https://countflows.com/tools/reading-time
- https://countflows.com/blog

# Last-updated: 2026-06-19
# End of llms-full.txt
